case_title: DE BEAUCLAIR, DALE DBA LE CLUB RESTAURANT VS STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF ALCHOLIC BEVERAG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $765.00 FILED BY DE BEAUCLAIR, DALE DBA LE CLUB RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF ALCHOLIC BEVERAG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF SEP-17-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO DEPT. OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE BEAUCLAIR, DALE DBA LE CLUB RESTAURANT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF ALCHOLIC BEVERAG PARTIES STIP THAT COURT HAS JURISDICTION OVER THE STATE & DEF COULD BE REPRESENTED BY AN ATTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
